channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Angry Americans are hitting Trump where it hurts the most: Elon Musk
item.description: Earlier this week, Donald Trump staged what historians believe to be a presidential first: a stilted, fumbling White House press conference convened to boost the fortunes of a valuable donor’s floundering car company.
item.dc:creator: Jay Willis, Fast Company

item.title: This free web-based image editor gives Photoshop a run for its money
item.description: AI image editing may be all the rage, but good old-fashioned image editors are still essential. There’s a problem, though: Windows PCs, Chromebooks, and Macs don’t include exceptional image editors that go beyond the most basic editing needs.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: Iran's Hijab Crackdown: UN Report Reveals Widespread Surveillance and Informant Network
item.description: A United Nations report has found that Iran is increasingly relying on electronic surveillance and the public to inform on women refusing to wear the country's mandatory headscarf in public.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Refocusing CISA under Trump: A strategic approach to critical infrastructure defense
item.description: Refocusing CISA's efforts promises to defend against current threats while anticipating and mitigating future challenges, securing America's cyber future. The post Refocusing CISA under Trump: A strategic approach to critical infrastructure defense first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Details of Nvidia's fastest video card ever leak; RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPU will have 96GB GDDR7 ECC memory
item.description: Details of Nvidia's fastest video card ever, the RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell GPU, have been spotted online.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Bay Area adds jobs in January while California hiring grinds to a halt
item.description: The Bay Area gained jobs in January, fueled by sturdy gains in the South Bay and East Bay, although the San Francisco metro region lost jobs.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: West Virginia football coach Rich Rodriguez isn’t here for locker room dances
item.description: From the White House to the local police department, TikTok trends are now part of the cultural conversation—for better or worse. But don’t expect to see the latest dance craze in the West Virginia football team’s locker room.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: The world's leading website builder aims to save businesses time with new tool
item.description: A new automation builder is now available in both Wix and Wix Studio, with additional options available for premium users.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: GitLab Releases Patch for Nine Flaws, Including Two Critical Severity Ones
item.description: GitLab has patched nine vulnerabilities affecting its Community Edition (CE) and Enterprise Edition (EE) solutions, including two critical severity ones that allow threat actors to bypass authentication.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Volt Typhoon threat group had access to American utility networks for the best part of a year
item.description: 2023 saw the Chinese threat group Volt Typhoon get access to public power and water utilities in Massachusetts for 10 months.
item.dc:creator: luke.hughes@futurenet.com (Luke Hughes), TechRadar

item.title: TikTok's Uncertain Future: Oracle Partnership in the Works?
item.description: TikTok may be exploring a deal with Oracle in the US, but will it meet the April 2025 deadline? Find out here.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Arbitrator sides with Meta in bid to halt sales of ex-employee's memoir
item.description: An arbitrator has sided with Meta in its case against a former employee who made a series of misconduct allegations about the Facebook and Instagram parent company in a memoir published this week.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Designing a dynamic web application with Astro
item.description: Astro.js is among the most popular meta-frameworks for JavaScript developers, and for good reason. Astro makes it relatively easy to structure web applications for maximum effect with minimal effort.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How Wasm reinvents web development
item.description: WebAssembly fascinates me. The notion of assembly language is as old as computing. Typically, assembly meant specific instructions for moving data around inside of a physical central processor. Everything in a computer is ones and zeros, but a layer above that is assembly code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Preparing for the impact of AI in government contracting projects
item.description: The impact of artificial intelligence in government contracting projects is transformative as it creates new avenues to be better and stand out. The post Preparing for the impact of AI in government contracting projects first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: White House nominates top leaders for CISA, other DHS components
item.description: Sean Plankey has been tapped to lead CISA after serving in key cyber roles during Trump's first term. His nomination comes as CISA grapples with recent cuts. The post White House nominates top leaders for CISA, other DHS components first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works. Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dangerous malware targets you through fake loan app
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says a malware app called SpyLend is posing as a financial tool, hitting 100,000-plus downloads.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Weaviate adds agents to its tech stack to ease gen AI app development
item.description: Vector database provider Weaviate has added three new agents to its development stack to facilitate the development of generative AI-based applications. These agents are modular agentic workflows that use large language models (LLMs) and prompts to interact dynamically with data in Weaviate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2
item.description: Joe Welch, the deputy to the commanding general of the Army Futures Command, said the characteristics of need helps define the problem set for industry. The post How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Fortran, Delphi rise in Tiobe popularity index
item.description: Older programming languages such as Fortran and Delphi are making a comeback, based on the results of this month’s Tiobe index of language popularity. Tiobe attributes their rise to the need to maintain vital legacy systems still dependent on them.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trade groups urge the administration to maintain basic research funding
item.description: "The Trump administration's efforts to reduce the size of the federal government have resulted in decreased funding for biomedical research," said Sandra Babosu The post Trade groups urge the administration to maintain basic research funding first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: How genomics and AI could help treat cancer more effectively
item.description: “These discoveries highlight how genetic profiling can play a crucial role in personalizing cancer care,” Ruishan Liu said in a news release.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
